_meta.note: slug -> {description, emotion, usage_context, tags} in Traditional Chinese (zh-TW, Taiwan vocabulary). Machine-generated zh-TW overlay applied at import by corpus.upstream, attaching locales['zh-TW'] with per-field machine provenance and a passing drift status. Each value passes check_drift at generation (Simplified chars and mainland vocabulary rejected, retried once, then the field is skipped). `name` stays English -- localize() falls back to the top-level English name (documented v1 limitation). This file ships as an empty skeleton; populate it with `meme-mcp translate-corpus` against your LLM endpoint, then re-seed and run `reindex-embeddings --force`. Re-running translate-corpus only fills missing slugs.
